Telangana Law Common Entrance Test.official_note: Official TS LAWCET counselling/admissions portal (TSCHE) that publishes web-option seat allotment and last-rank lists; SSL certificate expired so the fetcher was blocked, but multiple searches confirm this is the authoritative counselling domain. Exam/result + rank-card site is lawcet.tgche.ac.in.

Telangana State Engineering Agriculture.official_note: Official TG EAPCET (formerly TS EAMCET) counselling portal where seat allotment and college/branch last-rank (closing-rank) details are published; strongly confirmed via search. The previously listed eapcet.tgche.ac.in/TSEAMCET/EamcetLastRankDetails.aspx returns 'Invalid Access' (dead/old portal); eapcet.tgche.ac.in is only the rank-card/result site.

Telangana State Polytechnic Common Entra.official_note: Official SBTET Telangana POLYCET portal that releases rank card, qualifying cutoff and round-wise counselling/seat-allotment results; fetcher blocked by a TLS certificate-verification error, but it is the correct .gov.in domain (search-confirmed).

Tripura Board of Joint Entrance Examinat.official_note: Official TBJEE (Tripura JEE) site; hosts the PCM/PCB rank-wise merit lists as PDFs (e.g. Common-Result List_PCB.pdf) used for counselling/admission. Fetch was refused (ECONNREFUSED / bot-block) but search confirms merit lists are published here. tbjee.tripura.gov.in is a mirror.

Undergraduate Common Entrance Examinatio.official_note: Official UCEED (IIT Bombay) admissions page; verified to list the BDes seat-allotment PDFs for Rounds I-IV containing institute-wise opening and closing category ranks for IIT Bombay/Delhi/Guwahati/Hyderabad/Indore/Roorkee and IIITDM Jabalpur.

Unitedworld Institute of Design Entrance.official_note: Official UID (Karnavati University) admissions page; fetcher blocked by a TLS cert (altname) error. UID does NOT publish numeric cutoffs/ranks — selection is via UID DAT + Situation Test + Portfolio Evaluation, so no official cutoff page exists; this admissions page is the closest authoritative source.

University of Petroleum and Energy Studi.official_note: Verified official UPESDAT (UPES Design) admissions page with eligibility and merit-based selection criteria for B.Des/M.Des. UPES does not publish numeric cutoff ranks — selection is via UPESDAT/national test score + portfolio + interview, so no dedicated cutoff page exists.
